The Formation Plane can be used to place or drop blocks in front of it. It needs to be filtered to do so.

The Annihilation Plane can be used to break blocks in front of it. It can be enchanted with fortune to drop mor items when breaking ores for example. It cannot be filtered so it will break anything (it can be filtered but you need a subnet for that which a little bit complicated, go take a look at GuideMe).

Tired of having to always go to your &9Terminals&r to use your &3ME&r Network ?
Look no further, with the ME Wireless Access Point and the &9Wireless Terminal&r you can access your &3ME&r Network wirelessly !
Connect the ME Wireless Access Point to your &3ME&r Network, put some Boosters in it for better range and link the &9Wireless Terminal&r inside it's GUI.
Combining different &9Wireless Terminals&r together will allow you to access all of their features in 1 item.
&7Cable Facades&r can be used to hide cables.
Like other subparts they can be placed on all faces of any cable.
They are hidden in JEI so to craft them, place the block to imitate at the center of a crafting table and 4 &7Cable Anchors&r around it.
Unlike &7Cable Anchors&r, &7Cable Facades&r will not stop networks from connecting.
Also, they can be placed on top of the other subparts like a &9Terminal&r or an &cExporter&r. The other subpart will show through and will work like normal.

Parts are full blocks while subparts can be in the same block as a cable as it is placed on it.
Some parts can be both. For exemple, the ME Pattern Provider can be a part or a subpart, both versions exist and you can go from one to another by just placing i in the crafting table.
Other subparts like the ME Export Bus do not have a full block counterpart.
Parts can connect to both small cables and dense cables but subparts can only connect to small cables
Parts and Subparts
&9Energy Cells&r x8 for more power in the same space !
&7The &bQuantum Computer&7 is a special type of crafting computer designed to handle an &eunlimited number of crafting requests&7—as long as it has enough &bcrafting storage&7 available.
&bQuantum Data Entangler&7: Multiplies the storage of all storage blocks in the multiblock by &b4x&7, and only &eone&7 can be placed.
&bQuantum Multi-threader&7: Multiplies total co-processing power by &b4x&7, and only &eone&7 can be placed.
&6Multiblock rules&r
&7The Quantum Computer multiblock can scale up to &b7x7x7&7 (external dimensions).
&7The outside layer must be &bQuantum Structure&7 blocks, and &eQuantum Structure cannot be placed inside&7 the multiblock.
&7The interior must contain &eno empty spaces&7 (you can fill extra space with &bQuantum Unit&7 blocks for no additional benefit).
&7Place &eexactly one&7 &bQuantum Core&7, and at most &eone&7 &bData Entangler&7 and at most &eone&7 &bMulti-threader&7.
&6Quantum Core&r
&7The &bQuantum Core&7 is the heart of the system: it works standalone and provides &b256M crafting storage&7 plus &b8 co-processors&7 on its own.
&7When used standalone, power must be provided through the &eUp or Down&7 sides (where the connectors are).
&6Storage expansion&r
&7Use &bQuantum Storage&7 blocks to increase the available crafting storage and therefore improve how many concurrent tasks the computer can handle.
&7Two variants exist: &b128M&7 and &b256M&7 capacity.
&6Performance blocks&r
&bQuantum Accelerator&7: Adds &b8 co-processors&7 to the multiblock, and all crafting tasks can share the available co-processors—so stacking accelerators is very effective.
&9&lQuantum Computer&r
Automating Machines is nice but what about normal Crafting Table Crafts ?
The &5Molecular Assembler&r is made for you !
Place them next to Pattern Providers with Crafting Patterns in them and the will act as a Crafting Table.
Multiple &5Molecular Assemblers&r can be put next to a Pattern Provider for faster crafting.
Don't forget to put Acceleration Cards in them !

&7The &bWireless Transceiver&7 is an advanced AE wireless device that sends &eME channels&7 over the air—like wireless connectors, but with &across-dimensional&7 reach similar to Quantum Rings. One setup can feed channels to &emultiple locations&7.
&6&lControls (mode and frequency)&r
&7Use these actions to configure and protect your setup:
&eRight-click (empty hand):&7 Toggle &bMaster/Slave&7 mode
&eShift + Right-click:&7 Increase frequency
&eShift + Left-click:&7 Decrease frequency
&eHold Wrench + Left-click:&7 Quickly adjust frequency
&eWrench + Right-click:&7 Lock mode and frequency (prevents accidents)
&eQuartz Cutter:&7 Rename the transceiver; a Slave’s UI shows the connected Master’s name for easier management
&6&lHow it works&r
&7The system uses a &emaster-slave&7 design:
&bMaster:&7 Connects to the source ME network and provides the channel
&bSlave:&7 Placed where you need the channel; receives it from a Master
&7A single &bMaster&7 can serve &emany Slaves&7.
&6&lCross-dimensional link&r
&7Wireless Transceivers can transmit channels &eacross dimensions&7.
&cRequirement:&7 The chunks containing both the Master and the Slave must stay &cloaded&7, or the connection will drop.
&9&lWireless Transceiver&r
Ok, now we can store Fluids !
Better &3ME Fluid Storage Cells&r have more capacity for fluids (bytes), but it's not that easy, 1 &3ME Fluid Storage Cell&r can only store up to 18 different fluid types.
Each 8 buckets of fluid of 1 type will take 1 byte.
For example, the &31k ME Fluid Storage Cell&r has 1024 bytes so you could store 8*1024 = 8,128 Water Buckets or about 56 times 18 different fluid buckets (56*18 = 1008).
Sneak right-click in the air with an empty cell to separate the component and housing.

The heart of the &3ME&r network.
The &dME Controller&r can be used to get more channels for your network, up to 32 per sides when using the &bFluix ME Dense Covered Cables&r !
It also acts as an &eEnergy Acceptor&r, giving power to the network.
It can be made into a multiblock to get even more channels but there are some rules:
-There cannot be 2 different &dME Controllers&r / &dME Controllers Multiblock&r in the same network.
-All the blocks of the multiblock must be inside a 7x7x7 area.
-A &dME Controller&r can have a maximum of 4 others touching it but not in a cross pattern. (Look at GuideMe for detailed examples)

&7A powerful multiblock that merges the functionality of a &bMolecular Assembler&7 and a &bPattern Provider&7. It helps you process &emultiple crafting tasks in parallel&7 (especially with enough &bCrafting Accelerators&7 in your ME network) and can save you &achannels&7 compared to large arrays.
&7Once the structure is correct and receiving power, the lines on the &9Frame&7 glow &bblue&7. That indicates the Matrix is &aonline&7.
&6&lCore functions&r
&9&lPattern Core&r
&7The Matrix only reads crafting patterns from its Pattern Cores.
&7Each Pattern Core provides &b36 pattern slots&7.
&9&lCraft Core&r
&7Crafting jobs get distributed across Craft Cores.
&7Each Craft Core can run &b8 jobs simultaneously&7.
&9&lSpeed Core&r
&7Speed Cores act like a built-in &bSpeed Card&7 upgrade.
&6How to build&r
&7With &b5 Speed Cores&7, the Matrix reaches &afull speed&7; more than 5 gives no further benefit.
&6&lAssembler Matrix Plus Cores&r
&7The Assembler Matrix can be upgraded with three &bPlus Cores&7. They work like the original cores, but with &egreatly increased stats&7.
&bAssembler Matrix Pattern Core+&7: Provides &e72 pattern slots&7 per core
&bAssembler Matrix Craft Core+&7: Runs &e32 crafting jobs in parallel&7 per core
&bAssembler Matrix Speed Core+&7: Gives &e5x the effect&7 of a regular Speed Core for the Matrix. You only need 1.
&7The Matrix is a solid &erectangular prism&7 with edge lengths from &b3 to 7&7 blocks.
&bEdges:&7 Use &9Assembler Matrix Frame&7
&bOuter faces:&7 Use &9Assembler Matrix Wall&7 and/or &9Assembler Matrix Glass&7
&bInside (must be fully filled):&7 Use any mix of &9Pattern Core&7, &9Craft Core&7, and &9Speed Core&7
&cRules:&7 The structure &cmust not be hollow&7 and must be completely filled.
&cRequired:&7 At least &e1x Pattern Core&7 and &e1x Craft Core&7 must be inside.
&6&lFormed state&r

The Storage Bus can be used to connect any other inventory to an &3ME&r Network !

For example, it can allow you to export all iron axes no matter the damage level and enchantments, or only export damaged diamond swords, not fully repaired ones.

The &3AE2&r mod uses channels.
Each connected &3AE2&r device will use 1 channel on the connected cable (some devices don't take a channel. It will be written in their corresponding quest).
Once a cable has reached it's max channels used, no more parts can be added to this cable.
An &3ME&r network without an &dME Controller&r&r can only have 8 channels, even if the cable used is better.
A &7Cable Anchor&r can be used to separate 2 networks where they otherwise would because the cables are the same color.
A &7Quartz Fiber&r can be used to transmit power between networks without connecting them.
Understanding channels
&bUnderstanding channels&r
Blank Patterns are used to store crafting recipes.
Put them in a Pattern Encoding Terminal to set their recipe.
You can then put them in &ePattern Providers&r.
If you are using the &3ME&r Network a lot or have a lot of automation, you might see that the Network doesn't have enough power to deliver at once.
For that, simply add &9Energy Cells&r, they don't take any channels.

&7The &bAssembler Matrix Upload Core&7 is a special module for your Assembler Matrix that enables &aautomatic pattern upload&7 directly from the &bPattern Encoding Terminal&7.
&6&lWhat it does&r
&7When this core is installed, patterns created in the Pattern Encoding Terminal are sent to the Assembler Matrix storage &ewithout manual transfer&7, including:
&bCrafting patterns&7
&bSmelter patterns&7
&bStonecutter patterns&7
&8Note:&7 This core only affects &eautomatic uploads from the Pattern Encoding Terminal to the Assembler Matrix&7. It does &cnot&7 change how processing patterns upload to &bPattern Providers&7.

You can also change the priority of a cell to make it so items will go in it first or last.

Make it so that every item types has the same amount of bytes allocated so that the &3Storage Cells&r will never become full of only one type.

ME Level Emitters can send redstone signals depending on their configuration.
With no cards, it will send a redstone signal when the filtered item's quantity is greater than / equal to / less than the amount configured.
With a &2Crafting Card&r, it can be set to "emit redstone while item is crafting" or "emit redstone to craft item".
Can be used to toggle devices that have a &2Redstone Cards&r.
While having Blank Pattern in your Inventory and pressing Q on a Item in JEI it will generate a Pattern for you.
Pressing Shift + LMB on a Item in JEI gives you a stack of this item in your inventory (needs wireless terminal).
if you dont have the items and have patterns you go into the request window
Tips
The &aME interface&r can import and export any item / fluid from and to an &3ME&r Network but won't do it on it's own.
To import items, they need to be piped into it.
To export Items, you need to tell it what to export and what ammount to keep in it's inventory, then you need to pipe it out.
It has 3 card slots which can accept a combination those cards:
1 Fuzzy Card, 1 Crafting Card, 1 Induction Card.
It can be both a part and subpart.
ME Interfaces
&aME interfaces&r
One of the most important block for automation !
The &ePattern Provider&r can recieve up to 9 patterns for autocrafting with machines from other mods.
When you or the &3ME&r Network requests a craft, the Pattern Provider will put all the ingredients in the connected machine / machines.
The full block can be right-clicked with a wrench to tell it which machine to use, otherwise it will use all connected machines.
The subpart will only use the machine it is facing.
Pattern Providers
&ePattern Providers&r
The &31k ME Storage Componant&r is your first step to storing Items in Drives.
It can be used to craft the &31k ME Item Storage Cell&r but also better Storage Componants.
Want to connect machines to your &3ME&r Network far from your base or in other dimensions ?
You'll need to create the Quantum Ring Multiblock.
First, you will need a lot Matter Balls. Those can be obtained in a Matter Condenser, just put a &31k ME Storage Componant&r in it and set it to Matter Ball mode.
Next, insert 256 units of any item to get 1 Matter Ball.
The prefered method though is to use water as 32 Buckets will make 1 Matter Ball and the Mekanism Pump will give you all the water you'll need.
You can also create &1Singularitys&r directly in the Matter Condenser with a &364k ME Storage Componant&r but the number of items / fluid needed is way higher then the craft used in the next quest.
Now we get better cables !
The &bFluix ME Dense Covered Cable&r will transmit 32 channels. They should be used to connect the &dME Controller&r (more on that in it's dedicated quest)
The only drawback is that it won't connect to subparts but they do connect to the smaller cables so use those together.
They are available in many colors which will stop them from connecting to other colors.

ftbquests.chapter.blood_magic.quest7738B: &4Blood Magic&r is a powerful and dangerous magic mod centered around the use of life force — your own blood — to fuel powerful rituals, alchemy, tools, and effects.
• LP powers your rituals and creations via the Blood Altar.
• More advanced altars unlock greater magical power.
Blood Magic adds:
• Daggers and sacrificial tools
• Magical sigils with special abilities
• Alchemical items
• Unique progression items like Tartaric Gems
• Blood Magic offers &apowerful&r effects unavailable
through normal means.
• Many systems are driven by &cLife Essence&r, which
It is an arcane art practiced by mages seeking forbidden power, but every action has a cost. Be warned: blood magic can be deadly if used carelessly.
can cost your health if mismanaged.
• Using Rituals and altars incorrectly can be &cdeadly&r.
Blood Magic includes an in-game guidebook (Sanguine Scientum) that explains progression, rituals, altars, and tools.
Craft it with a &abook&r and &aglass&r to get started.
Blood Magic works great with tech and automation mods. You can automate your Life Essence production or use it with machinery and other magical mods to deepen your gameplay.
Blood Magic revolves around collecting &cLife Essence&r (by harming yourself or mobs) and using it to power:
• Blood Altars
• Rituals
• Magical tools and sigils
• Powerful armor and effects
• You generate Life Essence (LP) by sacrificing health
or killing mobs with special tools.
Welcome to Bloodmagic
Welcome to &4Blood Magic&r
ftbquests.chapter.blood_magic.quest7C9BB: The &4Blood Orb&r Allows you to use blood in rituals, and is used in certain crafts
Each higher tier of blood orb will require a new material, and a higher tier of blood altar
Each orb also allows you to absorb a certain amount of blood in your own personal blood store. This store can be filled by placing the blood orb in a filled blood altar.

ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest52ED0C77D: The &3Petal Apothecary&r is the first crafting apparatus of &aBotania&r.
It will allow you to create &eFunctional&r Flowers but more importantly, create &6Generating&r Flowers.

&eFunctional&r Flowers are flowers that each have a specific function. They aren't really useful as other mods are better at what they do. If you want to use them, you can see all of them in the &aLexica Botania&r, chapter "Functional flora"
&6Generating&r Flowers are flowers that produce &bmana&r. Each flower generate mana in a different way which will be described in their respective quests.
To use the &3Petal Apothecary&r, fill it with water and throw all the ingredients into it then throw a seed.
* Recipes that uses &5Runes&r won't consume them, once the craft is done you will get them back
* Once you have completed a recipe, right click on the &3Petal Apothecary&r with an empty hand to repeat the craft.
ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest55795F601: The &bBand of Aura&r is a portable &bmana&r generator.

ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest5D0D87201: The &2Wand of the Forest&r is &aBotania's&r wrench.
Holding it will allow you to see specific information about &aBotania's&r blocks like the amount of &bmana&r currently in them.
It has two modes, &5Bind&r and &3Function&r. Shift right-click with it in the air to change the mode.
&5Bind mode&r is used to bind blocks together by sneak right-clicking. The bind order is always first the "generator" then the "consumer". Specific uses will be described in the quests using it.
&3Function mode&r acts like a normal wrench from other mods, it can rotate blocks. Specific uses will be described in the quests using it.
ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest6161D04D8: The &bMana Splitter&r is used to split a burst of &bmana&r to 4 different pools.

ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest6292C7B74: Like their name implies, the &eSpark Augments&r will allow you to upgrade / control your &eSparks&r like you want.
Dispersive Augment: The &eSpark&r will try to drain the &bmana&r in its pool to charge nearby player's &bMana Tablet&r or &bBand of Mana&r.
Dominant Augment: The &eSpark&r will try to take the &bmana&r from other Sparks pools to their own pool.
Recessive Augment: The &eSpark&r will try to empty it's pool to other Sparks pools.
Isolated Augment: Will stop all interactions with Dominant or Recessive &eSparks&r
ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest630E72809: &aBotania's&r &bMana Lenses&r can be given to &2Mana Spreader&r to make hem more effective.

ftbquests.chapter.botania.quest70C75B3D3: The &2Mana Spreader&r is used to move &bmana&r around.

ftbquests.chapter.extreme_reactors.quest: The &9Fluid Port&r is used &o&bto insert&r vapors like &3Steam&r, or &o&bextract&r the product of the turbine, like &1Water&r if inputing &7steam.&r Because of this, you'll need &ntwo&r for your &2Turbine&r.
The &cPower Tap&r extracts power, and is &nrequired&r to complete the multiblock.
Turbine Ports
When building the &6Reprocessor&r, you will need &o&bat least&r one &aCollector&r and &3Waste Injector&r.
The &aReprocessor Collector&r must be placed &o&bin the center of the bottom face&r of the structure.
The &cWaste Injector&r must go &o&bin the center of the top face&r, which is where you'll &npipe in&r or &ninsert waste&r like &dCyanite Ingots&r.
Importing Waste
The &2Fluidizer&r is a &o&bcustomizable multiblock&r that has a &nminimum&r size of &o&b3x3x3&r.
You can transport the &bfluids&r with pipes from &cMekanism&r
The Fluidizer
The &dSolid access port&r allows for fuel to be &cinputed&r and waste &aoutputed&r from the reactor, while the &eEnergy tap&r stores and outputs the &creactors&r energy.
Reactor Interacting Components
The &6Reprocessor&r is a &o&b3x3x7&r multiblock structure that has &o&bspecific rules&r to complete the construction of the multiblock.
The heart of this multiblock is the &dController&r, and can be placed in &o&bany vertical face&r as long as it is not an &bedge/frame&r.
Just like the &2Reactor&r, the frame must be built out of &eCasings&r, but the walls can be &3Turbine Glass&r instead!
Turbine Construction Parts
Now that we have some &dCyanite&r from our &o&bsmall reactor&r, we'll want a way to &o&breprocess&r that &o&3waste&r into &nsomething useful&r. To do this, we'll need to build the &6Reprocessor&r.
This takes a lot of &dCyanite&r, so start &o&bstocking up&r! You might want to upgrade to a &o&bbigger reinforced reactor&r as well.
Reprocessing the Waste
These three parts can be placed on &o&bany vertical face&r as long as they aren't on the frame!
The &cPower Port&r is used to &o&bgive power&r to the multiblock machine to process waste.
The &9Fluid Injector Port&r is used &o&bto inject&r the liquid needed, which will depend on the type of waste injected. For &dCyanite&r, that means &o&1water&r!
The &cOutput Port&r is used &o&bto output&r the reprocessed material. You can &eRight-click&r it &o&bto grab&r the material out by hand, or &o&bpipe it out&r for automation.
When your &2Reinforced Reactor&r turns its coolent to &7vapor,&r you can send it to a &aturbine&r to &egenerate power&r and turn it into &bwater.&r
You can make &bturbines&l&r 5x5x10&r with &abasic parts&r, but much &ebigger&r with &6reinforced parts&r.
Just like the &creactor,&r you will need to place the &bturbine&r controller in the wall.
Turbines
When the reactor &o&6burns&r up fuel, it creates &o&dwaste&r that you will want to collect. That is what the other &3Solid Access Port&r is for!
Make sure to set it to &o&coutput&r, then &o&9pipe it&r into some type of storage.
Any #forge:ingots/cyanite
The Waste
&cReactors&r can also be used to &o&bheat up&r coolants like &o&bwater&r to create &o&bvapor&r, like &7Steam&r.
To do this, you'll need to build a &2Reinforced Reactor&r. I'd also suggest on it being bigger than a &o&b3x3x3&r.

To input a &o&bcoolant&r to the &creactor,&r you'll need two &9Forge Fluid Port&r. This will port in &nany fluids&r into the reactor. This will also be used to &o&bexport the vapor&r created in the reactor.
If you want, you can create a &eMekanism Fluid Port&r to convert the &o&bfluid steam&r into the mekanism &o&bgas steam&r instead.
The Actively Cooled Reactor
Your first&c basic reactor&r has a max size of &l5x5x5,&r though they &ecan be smaller&r, you can make by following these directions:
&lFirst:&r Make the &6walls&r and &6floor&r of &abasic Reactor Casing&r and &aGlass.&r
&lSecond:&r Add a &bbasic Reactor controller&r to one wall.
&lThird:&r add &dtwo basic Reactor Solid Access Ports&r, one set to &cInlet (red)&r the other &aOutlet (green)&r you can attach &epumps&r from other mods to these.
&lFourth:&r Add a &ebasic Reactor Active Forge Energy Power Tap&r, which will &astore&r and &apipe out&r &eenergy&r from the &creactor.&r

&lFifth:&r Then you want &9basic Reactor Fuel Rod&r in a &ediagonal&r pattern across the floor and build them up till &eone block&r from the roof where on top of the&9 Fuel rods&r you put &bbasic Reactor Control Rods.&r
Then fill in the empty spots of the roof with &aReactor casing&r. if done correctly the &etextures&r will change slightly to show it has become a &4Multi-block reactor.&r

You can build &cbigger reactors&r with &9reinforced forms&r of the previously mentioned blocks instead of &abasic ones&r, also the &etaller&r a &creactor&r is, the &emore fuel&r it will use and hold while the &6energy&r it will make increases, but the &awidth&r will help it &bcool.&r
The First Reactor
These are the used to create &cbasic reactors&r, and will be used for the &6outer walls&r and &6edges.&r
Reactor Casings
Any #forge:ingots/graphite
Graphite Bars
Just like the other &cmultiblocks,&r the frame will need to be made out of &7Casings&r, while the faces can be made out of &9Glass&r.
Fluidizer Construction Parts
The &2Fluidizer&r needs &o&epower&r to operate, so a &6Power Port&r is required and to take the product the &2Fluidizer&r makes you'll be needed a &cOutput Port&r as well.
Fluidizer Ports

The &2Fluidizer&r can operate in one of &o&b3&r modes: &o&bSolid&r to &o&bFluid&r, combining &o&b2 Solids&r into a &o&bFluid&r, or combining &o&b2 Fluids&r into a new &o&bFluid&r. This all depends on the type of &aInjectors&r you use for the multiblock.
For example, if you want to convert &1Blutonium&r into a fluid, you can use &o&b1&r &aSolid Injector&r,

If you want to combine &o&btwo solids together&r into something &nnew&r, you'll build the multiblock with &o&b2&r &aSolid Injectors&r. If you want to combine &o&btwo fluids&r, you'll use &o&b2&r &9Fluid Injectors&r.

This might seem confusing, but is &o&6important&r for progression. For example, you'll want to convert &cMagentite&r into a fluid in the &2Fluidizer&r first, then send it to a &eReprocessor&r with &5Ludicrite&r to create &7Ridiculite&r.
Fluidizer Injectors
Using the &6Reprocessor&r, we can combine &o&beverything&r we've made so far to make &o&bnew ingots&r.
You might need a &aFluidizer&r to complete this step!
One of the &o&bhardest materials&r to get in the mod! This block can be used as a &ecoil&r in your &bturbine.&r
Any #forge:storage_blocks/insanite
Insanite Block

These are used to make the &bturbine&r inside of the &cmulti-block build&r, place the &bturbine bearing&r inside the &emiddle block&r on the floor on the inside of the &amachine,&r then place your &6rotator&r &6shafts&r so they touch the &eroof,&r finally attach &6rotator&r &6blades&r to the &6shaft,&r the &bmore and longer&r they are, the more &7vapor&r your &bturbine&r can process.
Turbine Shaft
This is the &amain block&r you will be using to build the &breprocessor frame&r.
The Frame
Combining &bRidiculite Ingots&r with &4Rossinite&r will create &cInanite Ingots&r.
Any #forge:ingots/inanite
Inanite Ingot

Reactor &2Moderators&r are materials placed inside of a reactor where there aren't fuel rods &o&bto change how it performs&r, based on the &nproperties&r of the moderator. These are placed inside of the reactor &o&bduring construction&r.
The &o&9rarer&r the material is, the &nbetter&r of a &2Moderator&r it is. Leaving the reactor &o&bempty&r means you are using the &7air&r inside as a moderator, which isn't that great.
If you are looking for something &o&acheap&r in the early game, try using &3Graphite Blocks&r!
Reactor Moderators
After placing this in a &creactor&r you will be able to view its stats, including &epower controls&r fuel levels&6, and &ctemperature levels&r.
&oA few tips:&r
&cHigher core heat&r means &emore fuel used.&r
&cHigher casing heat&r &eincreases energy production&r, and &bcoolent conversion&r.

You can choose either &amanual&r or &bautomatic&r &ewaste ejection&r mode, &aManual&r means the pipe attached to the &dSolid port&r must call for the waste i.e &cMekanism&r p&aipes on pull mode&r, while &9automatic&r outputs the &ewaste&r to the pipe anyways.
&9Fuel rods&r and will be placed inside of a &creactor&r in a &ediagonal&r patteren, towering up to the &6roof&r where on the very top will be the &bControl rods&r.

If you interact with a &bcontrol rod&r, you will get a &6small slider&r on the bottom of a &lUI&r which allows you to "push the &9fuel rods&r" which makes them use &aless fuel&r, but make &eless energy&r.
The fuel for your first &cbasic reactor&r should be &auranium.&r
Reactor Control Rods
By using the &3Fluidizer&r, we can combine &1Blutonium&r with &eYellorium&r to make &2Verderium&r.
When used &o&bas fuel&r in a reactor, &2Verderium&r produces &4Rossinite&r as a reactant. &nWe need this&r!

To use &2Verderium&r as a fuel, you'll need to make &9Fuel Injection Ports&r for your reactor. Don't forget &o&bto empty&r out the fuel currently in your reactor, or make &o&ba new reactor&r for this purpose.
Making Rossinite

&aExtreme Reactors&r is a mod focused on &epower generation&r though &bturbines&r and &creactors.&r This quest-line will act as your &aguide&r through this world of &eelectricity,&r once you have &agenerated power&r you can use it for other mods like &cMekanism&r
Any #c:ingots/uranium
Welcome to &2Extreme Reactors
Once you've built a fully functional &6Reprocessor&r, you can pump in &ePower&r, &9Water&r and &dCyanite&r to create &1Blutonium&r.
This can be used as a fuel for your &2Reactor&r, and creates its own &o&3waste&r called &5Magentite&r.
Any #forge:ingots/blutonium
Blutonium Ingot
Now that you have &4Rossinite&r, you can mix it with &bBenitoite&r to create &6Insanite Ingots&r.
&bBenitoite Ore&r can be found in the &cNether&r.
Any #forge:ingots/insanite

ftbquests.chapter.functional_drawer.ques: Ender Drawers can sync their inventory on a drawer frequency. This works across dimensions.
To &aget&r a frequency Sneak-Left-Click an Ender Drawer with a Linking Tool.
To &bset&r a frequency Sneak-Right-Click an Ender Drawer with a Linking Tool.
To clear your Linking Tool from a frequency Sneak-Right-Click air.
The Controller Access Point acts like the Storage Controller in terms of logistic interactions. (Input / Output/ Read Stored Items/Fluids)
The Simple Compacting Drawer allows automatic conversion between a base item and its compacted form. If there is no compacted form the Simple Compacting Drawer will act like a normal drawer.
(e.g. Redstone Dust <-> Block of Redstone)
Note: The base item needs to be stored in the bottom slot. Accepts a maximum of 3 storage upgrades while reaching the same capacity as normal drawers.
Stores 2048 (32 x 64) items of 1 type. Unstackable items will take up one stack each.
How to interact:
Left-Click: Extract a single item
Sneak-Left-Click: Extract a stack of items
Right-Click: Store held item in the drawer
Double Right-Click: Store all matching items in the drawer
The basic Storage Drawer
Item exclusive upgrade
Reduces the capacity of a drawer to 64 items.

The Storage Controller can be linked to drawers in an area around it without direct contact. It can be used to interact with any connected drawer. Each Storage Controller creates an exclusive group of connected drawers. Therefore only one Storage Controller is allowed per "group".
Basic range: 8 Blocks centered on the Storage Controller
Upgrades: Storage Upgrades increase the range of the Storage Controller
The Armory Cabinet stores up to 4096 unstackable items.
The items can only be accessed via external storage tools like Applied Energistics, Refined Storage or Integrated Dynamics.
Similar to the 1x1 drawer
Stores 1024 items in each slot (total: 2x 16x64)
Note: When locking the drawer all slots will be locked.
Collects matching items within 1 Block of the specified direction. To change the direction Right-Click the upgrade while it is your inventory or in the drawer GUI.
Pulls items from an adjacent inventory.
To change the direction Right-Click the upgrade while it is your inventory or in the drawer GUI.
Makes the drawer output a comparator signal proportional to the amount of items stored.
To change the targeted slot Right-Click the upgrade while it is your inventory or in the drawer GUI.
&1Functional Storage&r adds compact and expandable storage solutions to Minecraft, such as drawers, cabinets, and controller blocks for efficient item organization and automation.
Functional Storage
Storage Upgrades increase the amount of items and fluids that can be stored per drawer or increase the range of the Storage Controller.
To install an upgrade Right-Click the drawer with an upgrade or open the drawer GUI by Right-Clicking the border or any other side than the front.
To remove an upgrade open the GUI by Right-Clicking the edge of the drawer or any side but the front and take the upgrade out.
Storage Upgrades
These upgrades add extra functions to your drawers. A maximum of 3 functional upgrades can be installed.
To install an upgrade Right-Click the drawer with an upgrade or open the drawer GUI by Right-Clicking the border or any other side than the front.
To remove an upgrade open the GUI by Right-Clicking the edge of the drawer or any side but the front and take the upgrade out.
Functional Upgrades
The Compacting Drawer allows automatic conversion between a base item and two compacted forms. If there is no compacted form the Compacting Drawer will act like a normal drawer.
(e.g. Iron Nugget <-> Iron Ingot <-> Block of Iron)
Note: The base item needs to be stored in the bottom right slot. Accepts a maximum of 3 storage upgrades while reaching the same capacity as normal drawers.
Voids any items inserted that overflow the capacity of the drawer.
Similar to the 1x1 Fluid Drawer.
Stores 16 Buckets in each slot (total: 2x 16B)
Note: When locking the drawer all slots will be locked.
Pushes items to an adjacent inventory.
To change the direction Right-Click the upgrade while it is your inventory or in the drawer GUI.
Similar to the 1x1 drawer
Stores 512 items in each slot. (total 4x 8x64)
Note: When locking the drawer all slots will be locked.
The Linking Tool is used to manage the connection of drawers to the controller. Right-Click on drawers to add or remove them.
Modes:
&2Add&r a single drawer
&2Add&r multiple drawers
&5Remove&r a single drawer
&5Remove&r multiple drawers
To switch between adding and removing Right-Click while targeting air.
To switch between single and multiple mode Sneak-Right-Click while targeting air.
The Creative Vending Upgrade, while technically a storage upgrade, allows you to extract infinite items from the drawer.
Important: The available amount of items shown will be 0 unless the Creative Vending Upgrade is inserted while at least 1 item is stored.
Similar to the 1x1 Fluid Drawer.
Stores 8 Buckets in each slot (total: 4x 8B)
Note: When locking the drawer all slots will be locked.
Stores 32 Buckets of one fluid.
How to interact:
Left-Click with a bucket: Extract fluid
Right-Click with a bucket: Store fluid
Only one Max Storage Upgrade is needed to increase the storage capacity and range to the maximum available.
The Configuration Tools changes various settings on your drawers. When used on a Storage Controller ALL connected drawers will be affected by the settings changed.
To cycle through the setting Right-Click in air.
Settings:
&1Locking&r: When locked the drawer will remember the last item/fluid in its inventory when empty and prevent other items/fluids from being inserted.
&6Hide/Show Amounts&r: Hides/Shows the amount contained in the drawer.
&aHide/Show Item/Fluid Renders: &rHides/Shows the content of a drawer on its face.
&9Hide/Show Upgrade Renders:&r Hides/Shows the icons on the bottom left and right of the drawer when upgrades are installed.
&4Swap Indicator Modes:&r  (Default = Hidden) Swaps between different visualizations of the stored amount.
ftbquests.chapter.hostile_neural_network: The &dSimulation Chamber&r is the main machine within HNN. \\n \\n When given power, it will run simulations based on the &bData Model&r that is placed inside. The power required also depends on the Data Model placed inside, and can be seen within the Model's tooltip.  \\n \\n The machine also requires at least one &9Prediction Matrix&r to run a simulation. \\n \\n The result of the simulation will be output onto the Matrix. Simulations will always produce some kind of &eGeneralized Prediction&r, which can be used in various crafting recipes. They also vary depending on the origin of the mob in the Data Model. \\n \\n If the simulation succeeds, you will receive a &dMob Prediction&r based off of the model. The higher the tier of the Data Model used, the higher the success rate is for a simulation.

The &5Loot Fabricator&r is the machine that gets you that sweet, sweet loot from Mob Predictions. \\n \\n When given power and a successful Mob Prediction, you will be able to choose which item you'd like to get from that mob's Data Model. The machine will remember your choice, so it can be automated. \\n \\n Notable Mob Predictions: \\n \\n - &dEnder Dragons&r for &dDragon Eggs&r \\n - &2Zombies&r for Iron \\n - &0Withers&r for &5Nether Stars&r
Upgrade the tier of the Data model. Faulty Data models cant be upgraded
You cant put the Chaos Dragon Data Model inside the Simualting Modeling and you should not put it inside the Merger!

Once you make your first Data Model, you'll need to level it up to be useful. \\n \\n Data Models start out at the first tier: &7Faulty&r. You'll need to at least level it to &aBasic&r if you'd like to run some simulations on it! \\n \\n Once placed inside of the Deep Learner, the HUD will tell you how many kills are required to level it up. You can also see this info in the tooltip of the Model itself, although you'll have to do math.

&6Hostile Neural Networks&r (or HNN for short) is a mod based around simulating mob kills for loot! \\n \\n To do this, you will be collecting 'data' on mobs, then running simulations from the data to create their drops!

The &9Deep Learner&r is one of the core components of HNN. \\n \\n With this item, you can right click to open up a HUD and store &6Data Models&r to gather data while killing mobs. \\n \\n Each Learner can hold 4 Data Models, and as long as you have the Learner anywhere in your inventory, it will collect data for the models placed inside! \\n \\n Note: You can have multiple Deep Learners in your inventory, and it will count the kills for all Data Models inside all of the Learners.
Upgrade the speed of the machine
You need to put them in this order inside the Merger Camera:
&4DONT USE THE CHAOS GUARDIAN INSIDE THE MERGER OR THE SIMULATING MODELING.&r
Wither Skeleton, Wither, Ender Dragon, Warden Data Model

&9Model Frameworks&r are the starting point for creating Data Models. \\n \\n To start collecting data on a specific mob, you'll want to make one of these then &9right click&r the mob you'd like to gather data on. When done properly, the Model Framework will turn into the Data Model of the mob you clicked on. \\n \\n To 'gather data' for that mob, place the newly created Data Model inside of a &aDeep Learner&r, then start killing that specific mob with the Deep Learner in your inventory.
You cant put the Chaos Dragon Data Model inside the Simualting Modeling and you should not put it inside the Merger!

ftbquests.chapter.masterful_machinery.qu: The Infinity Crucible is the way to automate renewable Draconic Evolution Chaos Shards.
The EssenceForge is your mid- to endgame resource production using Mystical Agriculture.

Using some Ether Gas the EssenceForge processes Mystical Agriculture seeds to produce the corresponding essences. The seeds and cruxes are NOT consumed, as is indicated by the small &4x&r in the recipe.
Higher Tier EssenceForges require multiple seeds to be present in the input port at once. For all requirements see the uses of the EssenceForge in JEI.
It is recommended to use the Fire Attuned Machine to produce the necessary Ether Gas in later gamestages.
The Mechanical Empowerer removes the fiddly automation from the Actually Additions' Empowerer and a few other recipes. Notably, the automation of EnderIO recipes including Soul Vials.
For all available recipes look up the uses of the Mechanical Empowerer Controller.
The Auto Sieve will provide the basic resources you need in your daily skyblock adventures.
Processing speed and amounts increase with Multiblock Tier.
For all available recipes look up the uses of the Auto Sieve Machine Controller.
The Event Horizon Antimatter Synthesizer is a powerful alternative to produce Mekanism Antimatter. It is recommended to use multiple Synthesizers in conjunction with a Mekanism Naquadah Reactor.

You can refer to the Mekanism Naquadah Reactor quest line for every production step in their regular machines. JEI will show all available replacement recipes using the Event Horizon Antimatter Synthesizer Controller.
A basic water generator. Higher Tiers provide more water per operation.
The Fire Attuned Machine offers a few high temperature recipes.
Example uses:
- Early Lava
- Life Essence
- Ether Gas
For all available recipes look up the uses of the Fire Attuned Machine Controller.
The Masterful Machinery Multiblock machines are custom made to streamline automation. From early on to the end of progression there will be a use for these machines.
Use the Priority Setter to set the priority of output ports if your machine has multiple.
Instructions on how to use it are in the tooltip.
Higher priority = output first
Tip: Make a Multibuilder Tool!. Quest added by Aquadin. Thank you a lot!
Masterful Machinery

The Multi Compactor Machine compacts (who would have thought?!) Mystical Agriculture Essences and ProjectE Alchemical Fuels. As a bonus you can try to produce the elusive Intricate Hellforged Parts with huge amounts of Coal and Gems (WIP).
For all available recipes look up the uses of the Multi Compactor Machine Controller.
The Auto Crusher Machine provides selected hammering and crushing related recipes.
Recommended as part of basic resource generation in conjunction with the Auto Sieve Machine.

ftbquests.chapter.mystical_agriculture.q: &dEssence&r is the starting point for all of your growing needs in Mystical Agriculture.
&eInferium Essence&r is the base tier of all essences. You can get this from mining, killing mobs, or by making seeds to grow them!
To make the bigger and better essences, you'll need to make an &9Infusion Crystal&r.
This special &eDust&r is dropped from the Wither and the Ender Dragon when killed by an &dEssence Weapon&r enchanted with &dMystical Enlightenment&r.
The best seed in the modpack.
It cant be tick accelerated and cant be put into a botanypot.
&bProsperity Shards&r are used as one of the main crafting mats for several of the recipes in Mystical Agriculture, like seeds, ingots, and more.
&dMystical Agriculture&r is a mod based around the concept of growing your resources with crops. Use crops to grow essences used to make materials, mob drops, tools, armor and possibly even more!
The &9Tinkering Table&r is used to upgrade &aEssence Gear&r with &dAugments&r.
Augments can be made using the Infusion Altar. Just like the Essences, Augments have tiers!

The &aWatering Can&r is used to increase the speed that crops grow. Higher tiers have a larger area of effect. To use this, fill it up with some water by right clicking some water, then hold right click near your crops to water them!
Shift+right click while looking in the air with the watering can to enable auto-watering.
&eEssence Farmland&r will increase the growth speed of the seeds. The certain seeds will require certain farmlands to be planted on.

&9Growth Accelerators&r very slightly increase the growth speed of a seed when placed directly underneath the farmland. Each tier has a range of how many blocks "up" it can accelerate, with Inferium being the lowest at 12.
The &9Infusion Altar&r is the bread and butter of creating &aSeeds&r in the mod. You'll need to create the Altar itself, as well as 8 Pedestals.
Placing the Altar down first will show you where to put the Pedestals. To craft a seed, place the required mats in each pedestal, then give a redstone signal to the Altar.
To start making &aEssence Gear&r, you'll need to make the Inferium Armor first.
This gear can be upgraded to higher tiers, just like the Essences. You can also &9Augment&r them with the &bTinkering Table&r!
This special &eDust&r is dropped from the Wither and the Ender Dragon when killed by an &dEssence Weapon&r enchanted with &dMystical Enlightenment&r.
To awaken your Supremium Essence, you'll need to create a new Altar and 4 new Pedestals, as well as a new type of pedestal called the &cEssence Vessel&r.
The Essence Vessels will require the starter Element Essences to fill: Fire, Water, Earth, and Air.
Most seeds are simple to make, but to make &9Mob Seeds&r, you'll need to head to the Nether to pick up some &8Soulium&r.

With the stone and ore that you find, you'll need to use these to make the &3Soulium Dagger&r and &3Soul Jars&r. Using the dagger to kill mobs, you'll be able to gather their &bsouls&r, which are used in the Infusion Altar to create the respective mob seeds.
Alternatively, you can fill Soul Jars inside of the &3Soul Extractor&r by inserting a jar and using mob items to fill them. For example, adding Rotten Flesh will give a portion of a Zombie Soul.
This special essence is used for making most of the &6Creative&r items.
Starting with Inferium Essence, you can create ingots to make both Essence &9Tools&r and &9Armor&r.
Essence tools can be upgraded to higher tiers, and just like the Armor, they can be &5Augmented&r in the &3Tinkering Table&r.

Welcome to the &bBasic Storage System&r chapter! Here, you'll learn about essential mods that improve your storage capabilities in Minecraft. This chapter covers:
These mods offer a variety of &dstorage solutions&r to help you manage your &aitems&r and &cfluids&r efficiently.
&eSophisticated Backpacks&r offer portable storage with upgradeable features, allowing you to carry more items on your adventures.
&eSophisticated Storage&r adds smarter storage solutions to Minecraft, including larger chests, barrels, and backpacks with upgrades like sorting, filtering, and auto-pickup.

&6Dank&r introduces 7 new containers that function as both storage and backpacks. Each slot can hold much more than a normal stack and increases with each tier. The stack size and tier color are fully configurable and shown in the tooltip, providing a quick visual reference.
Explore each mod to find the best storage solutions for your needs and enhance your overall gameplay experience.

ftbquests.chapter.package_mod.quest1CC35: The &ePackage Crafting Machine Proxy&r allows &6Unpackagers&r to send items to &aspecialized package crafting machines&r
• Bind a &eProxy Marker&r to a package crafting machine
• Insert the bound marker into the &eCrafting Proxy&r
• The proxy now knows where to send packages
• &aSneak + Right-click&r with a bound marker to unbind it
• You can copy a bound marker by crafting it
• Keep crafting machines far away from Unpackagers
This means crafting machines do &cNOT&r need to be placed directly next to an Unpackager.
• The proxy acts as a &eremote endpoint&r
• Unpackagers send packages to the proxy
• The proxy forwards them to the bound machine
This enables clean layouts and long-distance automation.

• &eRequire Disjoint&r

&b&lThe Importer&r&r extracts resources from a connected external inventory and inserts them into the storage network.
&b&lThe Exporter&r&r extracts resources from the storage network and inserts them into a connected external inventory.
&l&bThe Interface&r&r combines the functions of the &b&lImporter&r&r and &b&lExporter&r&r.

&b&lThe External Storage&r&r provides the storage network with storage from the connected external inventory. You can use it on chests, drawers, barrels ect. That way you can have a vast quantities of items in your storage without bloating the disks.
&l&bThe Autocrafting Upgrade&r&r will schedule an autocrafting task when a resource that is required by a storage network device is needed, but not available.
&b&lThe Constructor&r&r places resources from the storage network into the block space in front of it.
&4&lThe Destructor&r&r destroys blocks in front of it and stores the drops in the storage network.

&b&lThe Silk Touch Upgrade&r&r allows the &4&lDestructor&r&r to apply silk touch when breaking blocks.
